title: Trep's Cars
description: The perfect car mod for driving and drifting
body:
To start your automotive adventure, install Trep's Cars Mod and dive into a world of car crafting, customization, and exploration. Build your perfect car fleet and dominate the roads of Minecraft!

Please note that Trep's Cars Mod requires GeckoLib to run. Ensure you have the latest version of GeckoLib installed before using this mod.

Enjoy the ride and happy crafting with Trep's Cars Mod!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Car Crafting Table

Crafting a car has never been easier! Trep's Cars Mod introduces the Car Crafting Table, a specialized crafting station that allows you to create your very own vehicles. Choose from a selection of car body styles, wheels, and paint colors to customize your dream ride.

 

Steel Ores

Dig deep into the earth to discover new steel ores. Use raw iron, blaze powder and charcoal to smelt and craft raw steel, a vital component for creating powerful car bodies.

 

Car Component Items

No car is complete without the right components. Trep's Cars Mod adds various essential parts like wheels, car bodies, and paint cans in all default Minecraft colors. Get creative and mix and match different components to create a car that suits your personality.

 

Drifting & Driving

With the special drifting key (Default Left Alt) You can drift in any direction to create some major maneuver moves.

Driving is done with the keys, the car is always in Freelook.

 

Car Health Inspection?

The car is vulnerable against: Fire, Drowning and Fall Damage above 10 Blocks

The car is invulnerable against: Splash Potions except for Instant Damage, Fall damage from 10 blocks or below

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Goals

 

100 Downloads  ✅

500 Downloads ✅

1000 Downloads ✅

2500 Downloads ❌

5000 Downloads ❌

10.000 Downloads ❌
